title: Encompass
body:
Get out your iron, redstone, and various other crafting ingredients for these custom compass textures!

**Current Features:**
- Recovery Compasses are more consistent with Normal Compasses, while keeping their skulked up style.
- Lodestone Compasses are more distinct, matching the ornately chiseled stones they're bound to (Requires [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)).
- [Nature's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-compass) and [Explorer's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass) have refreshed looks.

**Plans:**
- Maybe some tweaks to the Normal Compass.
- Support for more modded compasses if I find any that I want to freshen up.

How many times can you say compass before it stops sounding like a word?
